name: Aaron Tippin's Hillbilly Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the lean ground beef in a large saucepan, stirring until crumbly. Drain excess fat.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add crushed tomatoes and pinto beans. Cook over medium heat until bubbly.
4. Stir in chili seasoning, chili powder, and jalapeno pepper juice. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
5. Just before serving, stir in vinegar to enhance the flavor of the spices.
